jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Pilgrim
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
